# Yasir Khan - Small Business Website Specialist

> Expert web designer and developer specializing in high-performance, high-trust websites for small businesses using Next.js and GEO standards.

## Professional Summary
Yasir Khan is a technical web specialist with 5+ years of experience. He builds websites that load in under 1.2s and are optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Core Services
- Custom Web Design
- Next.js Development
- Technical SEO & GEO
- Conversion Rate Optimization
- Done-for-You Digital Solutions

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
- Performance: Vercel, Edge Functions, Image Optimization
- Trust: Robust Schema.org, E-E-A-T signals, Technical Data Tables

## Case Studies
### Apna Qarz
- Outcome: 1,000+ leads generated in month one.
- URL: /projects/apna-qarz

### Rehman Veterinary Clinic
- Outcome: Daily customer inquiries for a local clinic.
- URL: /projects/rehman-veterinary-clinic

## FAQ Highlights
- Mobile visitors leave if a page takes > 3s (Google Research).
- Inline citations improve AI visibility by 41% (Princeton, 2024).
- Custom design converts 2-5x better than generic templates.
